name: analyze_data_visualization
description:
Analyze data visualizations, charts, graphs, and dashboards to extract insights and trends.

Use this tool ONLY when the user has a data visualization image and wants to understand the data patterns or metrics.
This tool specializes in interpreting visual data representations.

Do NOT use for: UI mockups, error messages, or technical architecture diagrams.

image_source.description: Local file path or remote URL to the image

prompt.description: What insights or information you want to extract from this visualization.

analysis_focus.description: Optional: specify what to focus on (e.g., 'trends', 'anomalies', 'comparisons', 'performance metrics'). Leave empty for comprehensive analysis.
